abstract.t: This document defines the Signature-Key HTTP header field for distributing public keys used to verify HTTP Message Signatures as defined in RFC 9421. Five initial key distribution schemes are defined: pseudonymous inline keys (hwk), self-issued key delegation via JWK Thumbprint JWTs (jkt-jwt), identified signers with JWKS URI discovery (jwks_uri), JWT-based delegation (jwt), and X.509 certificate chains (x509). These schemes enable flexible trust models ranging from privacy-preserving pseudonymous verification to PKI-based identity chains and horizontally-scalable delegated authentication.
